name: copy-all-from-terminal
description: One-click copy of the entire integrated terminal buffer (including scrollback) with configurable whitespace cleaning.

copyAllFromTerminal.trim.description: Trim leading/trailing whitespace of the whole output block (applied last).

copyAllFromTerminal.removeLeadingSpaces.description: Strip leading spaces and tabs from each line.

copyAllFromTerminal.removeTrailingSpaces.description: Strip trailing spaces and tabs from each line.

copyAllFromTerminal.removeTrailingBlankL.description: Remove empty lines at the end of the output. The terminal buffer pads with many blank lines after the last prompt; this strips them.

copyAllFromTerminal.collapseBlankLines.description: Collapse runs of two or more blank lines into a single blank line (like `cat -s`).
